verdict_reason: Testcontainers Service Bus emulator setup follows the documented IntegrationBase singleton pattern, wires properties correctly into AzureServiceBusConfig and is exercised end-to-end by EventsSendControllerIT; only a minor image-pinning nit.

todos.issue: Service Bus emulator image uses floating 'latest' tag (and mssql uses floating '2022-latest'), so an upstream emulator release can break all ITs with no code change; project convention pins container tags (mongo:7.0, mock-oauth2-server:2.1.10) and Testcontainers docs pin servicebus-emulator:1.0.1
todos.fix: Pin both images to specific tags, e.g. mcr.microsoft.com/azure-messaging/servicebus-emulator:1.1.2 and mcr.microsoft.com/mssql/server:2022-CU14-ubuntu-22.04
